span.p:
M.1 Architecture-Reuse Duality
架构-复用二元性

span.p:
M.2 Variability Axiom

span.p:
M.3 Hierarchy Non-Reduction

span.p:
M.4 Identity Preservation
同一性保持

E.1 Reuse Asset Existence

span.p:
E.2 Cost-Benefit Threshold

span.p:
E.3 Context-Dependency

span.p:
S.1 Composition Preservation
组合保持

S.2 Interface Substitution

span.p:

P.1 Governance Invariance
